tool: duckdb-geo MCP query tool (NRP S3 GeoParquet + H3 hex)
method: Proportional feature-overlay: for each conserved unit, feature_area_in_unit x (Final_g1_p+Final_g2_p)/100, summed statewide / statewide feature extent. Implemented via H3 hex joins at each feature's native resolution (res-10 fractional, res-9 fractional, res-8 presence/threshold). Constant cell area cancels in the ratio; statewide baseline calibrated to 25.4-26.1%.
